variables.label: Application
variables.input: smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields name | sort name asc

0.content:
# 📊 Performance Visibility & Baselining Dashboard

**Application:** Selected via dashboard variable | **SLO Standard:** Google Core Web Vitals P75 | **Data Source:** Gen 3 RUM (`user.events`, `user.sessions`)

This dashboard **replaces manual Lighthouse/PageSpeed reports and cron-based daily/weekly reporting** with **continuous real-user monitoring** from Dynatrace RUM. Instead of synthetic single-point-in-time scores, you get **P75 baselines from thousands of real guest sessions** — with automatic regression detection, historical trending, and correlation to backend services.

| What You Had (Lighthouse/Cron) | What This Dashboard Provides (Enhancement) |
|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Daily Lighthouse score (1 synthetic run) | Continuous real-user P75 from thousands of sessions |
| Weekly cron report (point-in-time) | 30-day rolling trend with SLO thresholds |
| Single performance number | Full percentile distribution (P10–P95) per page |
| No segmentation | Breakdown by device, browser, OS, country |
| No error correlation | Error rates baselined alongside performance |
| No backend context | Frontend ↔ backend latency correlation |
| Manual dashboard build | Auto-updating, shareable, alertable |

| Metric | What Guests Experience | 🟢 Good | 🟡 Needs Work | 🔴 Poor | SLO Target |
|--------|----------------------|---------|---------------|---------|------------|
| **LCP** — Largest Contentful Paint | How fast the main content loads | ≤ 2.5s | ≤ 4.0s | > 4.0s | P75 ≤ 2.5s |
| **CLS** — Cumulative Layout Shift | How much the page layout shifts | ≤ 0.10 | ≤ 0.25 | > 0.25 | P75 ≤ 0.10 |
| **INP** — Interaction to Next Paint | How fast the page responds to taps/clicks | ≤ 200ms | ≤ 500ms | > 500ms | P75 ≤ 200ms |
| **FCP** — First Contentful Paint | How fast something first appears on screen | ≤ 1.8s | ≤ 3.0s | > 3.0s | P75 ≤ 1.8s |
| **TTFB** — Time to First Byte | How fast the server responds | ≤ 800ms | ≤ 1.8s | > 1.8s | P75 ≤ 800ms |

1.query: data record(a="Current Performance Scorecard — Real User P75 Baselines")

2.title: ⏱️ LCP — P75
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000)

3.title: 📐 CLS — P75
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift)
| summarize CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75))

4.title: 👆 INP — P75
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint)
| summarize INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000)

5.title: 🎨 FCP — P75
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint)
| summarize FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000)

6.title: 🖥️ TTFB — P75
6.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte)
| summarize TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000)

7.title: ✅ CWV SLO Pass Rate
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    cls_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75),
    inp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000,
    samples = count(),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter samples >= 30
| summarize
    total_pages = count(),
    passing_pages = countIf(toDouble(lcp_p75) <= 2500.0 and toDouble(cls_p75) <= 0.1 and toDouble(inp_p75) <= 200.0)
| fieldsAdd compliance_pct = toDouble(passing_pages) / toDouble(total_pages) * 100

8.query: data record(a="Traffic & Session Overview (from user.sessions — very low cost)")

9.title: 👥 Total Sessions (24h)
9.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:now()-24h
| filter frontend.name == $app
| summarize sessions = count()

10.title: 📄 Avg Page Views / Session
10.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:now()-24h
| filter frontend.name == $app
| summarize avg_pageviews = round(avg(navigation_count), decimals:1)

11.title: ⏳ Avg Session Duration
11.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:now()-24h
| filter frontend.name == $app
| summarize avg_duration_s = round(avg(duration) / 1000000000, decimals:0)

12.title: ⚠️ Error Session %
12.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:now()-24h
| filter frontend.name == $app
| summarize 
    total = count(),
    with_errors = countIf(error.count > 0)
| fieldsAdd error_pct = round(toDouble(with_errors) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals:1)

13.title: 📈 Daily Sessions — 30-Day Trend
13.query:
fetch user.sessions, from:now()-30d
| filter frontend.name == $app
| makeTimeseries sessions = count(), interval:1d

14.query: data record(a="30-Day Performance Baseline Trends — Replaces Daily Lighthouse Reports")

15.title: 📈 LCP P75 — 30-Day Baseline (SLO: ≤ 2,500ms)
15.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

16.title: 📈 CLS P75 — 30-Day Baseline (SLO: ≤ 0.1)
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75), by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

17.title: 📈 INP P75 — 30-Day Baseline (SLO: ≤ 200ms)
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

18.title: 📈 FCP P75 — 30-Day Baseline (SLO: ≤ 1,800ms)
18.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

19.title: 📈 TTFB P75 — 30-Day Baseline (SLO: ≤ 800ms)
19.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte)
| summarize p75 = percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d

20.query: data record(a="Week-over-Week Performance Comparison — Replaces Weekly Lighthouse Report")

21.title: 📊 This Week vs Last Week — CWV P75 Comparison
21.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-7d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize
    LCP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    Samples = count()
| fieldsAdd Period = "This Week"
| append [
    fetch user.events, from:now()-14d, to:now()-7d
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
    | lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
    | filter app.name == $app
    | summarize
        LCP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        CLS = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
        INP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        FCP_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        TTFB_ms = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
        Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
        Samples = count()
    | fieldsAdd Period = "Last Week"
]
| fields Period, Sessions, Samples, LCP_ms, CLS, INP_ms, FCP_ms, TTFB_ms

22.title: 📊 Week-over-Week CWV by Page (Top 10 Pages)
22.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-7d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize
    This_LCP = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    This_CLS = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    This_INP = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    This_TTFB = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    Samples = count(),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 30
| sort Samples desc
| limit 10
| lookup [
    fetch user.events, from:now()-14d, to:now()-7d
    | filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
    | lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
    | filter app.name == $app
    | summarize
        Prev_LCP = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        Prev_CLS = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
        Prev_INP = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
        Prev_TTFB = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
        by:{view.detected_name}
], sourceField:view.detected_name, lookupField:view.detected_name, prefix:"prev."
| fieldsAdd
    LCP_Delta = round(This_LCP - prev.Prev_LCP, decimals:0),
    TTFB_Delta = round(This_TTFB - prev.Prev_TTFB, decimals:0)
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Page, Samples, This_LCP, prev.Prev_LCP, LCP_Delta, This_CLS, prev.Prev_CLS, This_INP, prev.Prev_INP, This_TTFB, prev.Prev_TTFB, TTFB_Delta

23.query: data record(a="Page-Level Performance Audit — Replaces Per-Page Lighthouse Reports")

24.title: 📋 All Pages — Percentile Distribution (P10–P95) with SLO Status
24.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize 
    Samples = count(),
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P50 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 50) / 1000000),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    LCP_P95 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 95) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 10
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 20
| fields Page, Sessions, Samples, LCP_P50, LCP_P75, LCP_P95, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

25.title: 🔴 Pages Failing CWV SLOs — Prioritised by Guest Impact
25.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    Samples = count(),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| filter Samples >= 30
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| filter LCP_P75 > 2500.0 or CLS_P75 > 0.1 or INP_P75 > 200.0
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Page, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

26.query: data record(a="Error Rate Baseline & Trends — JS Errors, HTTP Errors, Exceptions")

27.title: ⚠️ Total JS Errors (24h)
27.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize total_errors = count()

28.title: 📊 Errors by Source Type (24h)
28.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Errors = count(), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{error.source, error.type}
| fieldsAdd Errors_Per_Session = round(toDouble(Errors) / toDouble(Sessions), decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Source = error.source, Type = error.type
| sort Errors desc

29.title: 📈 Error Count — 30-Day Baseline Trend
29.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| makeTimeseries errors = count(), interval:1d

30.title: 🔴 Top 15 Errors by Page & Error Name
30.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Errors = count(), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{page.detected_name, error.name, error.source}
| fieldsAdd Impact = round(toDouble(Errors) / toDouble(Sessions), decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Page = page.detected_name, Error = error.name, Source = error.source
| sort Errors desc
| limit 15
| fields Page, Source, Error, Errors, Sessions, Impact

31.query: data record(a="Resource & Request Performance — First-Party vs Third-Party")

32.title: 🌐 Request Performance — First-Party vs Third-Party (24h)
32.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "request"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(duration)
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = toDouble(round(avg(duration) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P75_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 75) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P95_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    Failed = countIf(isNotNull(error.name)),
    by:{url.provider}
| fieldsAdd Error_Rate_Pct = round(toDouble(Failed) / toDouble(Requests) * 100, decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Provider = url.provider
| sort Requests desc

33.title: 🐌 Slowest Third-Party Domains — Top 10 by P75 Latency (ms)
33.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "request"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter url.provider == "third_party"
| filter isNotNull(duration)
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = toDouble(round(avg(duration) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P75_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 75) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P95_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    by:{url.domain}
| filter Requests >= 10
| sort P75_ms desc
| limit 10
| fieldsRename Domain = url.domain

34.query: data record(a="Performance by Device Type — Mobile vs Desktop Baseline")

35.title: 📱 CWV P75 by Device Type
35.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{device.type}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Device = device.type
| sort Sessions desc
| fields Device, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

36.title: 📈 LCP P75 by Device — 30-Day Trend (ms)
36.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d), device.type}
| makeTimeseries lcp_p75 = avg(lcp_p75), time:{day}, by:{device.type}, interval:1d

37.query: data record(a="Navigation & Page Load Performance — Load Time Baselines")

38.title: 📋 Page Load Times — Top 15 Pages by Sessions (P50/P75/P95 in ms)
38.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(duration)
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    Navigations = count(),
    P50_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 50) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P75_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 75) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    P95_ms = toDouble(round(percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    Avg_ms = toDouble(round(avg(duration) / 1000000, decimals:0)),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 15
| fieldsRename Page = view.detected_name
| fields Page, Sessions, Navigations, P50_ms, P75_ms, P95_ms, Avg_ms

39.title: 📈 Navigation Load Time P75 — 30-Day Trend (ms)
39.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "navigation"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(duration)
| summarize p75 = percentile(duration, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d)}
| makeTimeseries p75 = avg(p75), time:{day}, interval:1d
